markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX's AI content services for St. Jude's fundraising arm, ALSAC.](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Challenge:** ALSAC needs to scale content creation beyond its current capacity and find new, non-branded search opportunities, but past attempts to target general fundraising topics have failed due to low search volume.](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=2133.0)
  - [**The Solution:** GrowthX offers a hybrid model (AI workflows + human experts) to produce 5 articles/week. A key feature is LLM monitoring via the partner tool Scrunch, which tracks AI answer visibility and sentiment.](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [**The Path Forward:** The team will explore specific, high-intent non-branded topics (e.g., Donor Advised Funds) and address key concerns like content accuracy for a highly regulated brand and the timeline for revenue impact.](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=2242.0)
  - [**Next Step:** A follow-up call with GrowthX CEO Marcel will address these questions. ALSAC will prepare a list of specific questions and a proposed scope by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=3151.0)

## Topics

### ALSAC's Content & SEO Challenge

  - [**Mission:** ALSAC is the fundraising and awareness arm for St. Jude Children's Research Hospital. The brand is St. Jude, not ALSAC.](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [**Current State:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Focus is on optimizing existing `stjude.org` content for AI search (FAQs, schema), not new article creation.](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
      - [A separate team creates \~5 patient/supporter stories per week for the "Inspire" blog.](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
      - [Primary tool is Conductor's "Writing Assistant" for optimization, not full-scale generation.](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [**Core Problem:** Past efforts to target non-branded fundraising topics failed due to low search volume. The team needs creative strategies for new audiences and content formats, especially for sensitive topics.](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=2242.0)

### GrowthX's Hybrid AI Content Service

  - [**Model:** A platform-powered service combining AI workflows with human experts (e.g., Chief Content Officer ran TechCrunch).](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
  - [**Standard Engagement:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (8 weeks):** Strategy sprint to build custom AI workflows ("context engineering") using client assets (personas, brand guides).](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Ongoing):** Growth execution, targeting 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [**LLM Monitoring:** Uses the partner tool Scrunch to track visibility and sentiment in AI answers against competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Client Examples:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
      - [**Augment Code:** 3x organic traffic in 6 months, enabling them to shut down paid ads.](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=1833.0)
      - [**Biologica:** Created specialized health content with a custom AI workflow to simulate a chief medical officer's review, ensuring accuracy for a highly regulated industry.](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)

### Proposed Path Forward for ALSAC

  - [**Initial Focus:** Educational content for high-intent donors (e.g., Donor Advised Funds, tax-efficient giving).](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=2242.0)
  - [**Customization:** GrowthX is open to custom projects beyond standard articles, like glossaries or directories.](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=2405.0)
  - [**Key Questions for Next Call:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=2503.0)
      - [**Revenue Impact:** Timeline from content creation to donations/leads.](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=2503.0)
      - [**Risk Mitigation:** Process for ensuring accuracy for a highly regulated brand.](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=3039.0)
      - [**Scope:** Focus on owned domains vs. other channels (social, Reddit).](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=2968.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**ALSAC Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=3151.0)
      - [Consolidate questions for the next call.](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=3151.0)
      - [Define a proposed scope for the partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=3196.0)
      - [Send the outline to Tyler by Monday, Jan 12.](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=3151.0)
  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=3151.0)
      - [Coordinate a follow-up call with CEO Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/zyLksXy7fQnr61zUVr3jobnt4zN64zcu?tab=summary&timestamp=3151.0)
